title: Unique Umami Filipino Black Pudding Wrap
description: A traditional Filipino dish featuring black pudding, wrapped in leaves and steamed to perfection, served in a mason jar. This raw-friendly dish is perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Prepare the black pudding by crumbling it into small pieces and setting it aside.
Cut the banana leaves into large squares and wash them thoroughly.
In a small bowl, mix together the rice vinegar, fish sauce, and lime juice.
Add the grilled pork, green onions, salt, and pepper to the bowl and mix well.
To assemble the wrap, place a piece of banana leaf on a flat surface and add a spoonful of the black pudding mixture in the center.
Add a spoonful of the pork mixture on top of the black pudding.
Fold the banana leaf over the filling to form a tight wrap and secure it with a toothpick.
Place the wraps in a steamer basket and steam for 10 minutes.
Serve the wraps in a mason jar and garnish with additional green onions if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers and consume within a day.
